Record Class Stock.SAStockRequest

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.novastack.iposca.stock.Stock.SAStockRequest
Record Components:
name - The name of the stock item.
packageType - The type of packaging for the stock item.
units - The units of the stock item.
unitsInAPack - The number of units in a single pack.
bulkCost - The bulk cost of the stock item.
markupRate - The markup rate of the stock item.
quantity - The quantity of stock to add/update.
stockLimit - The low stock level that triggers a warning.
Enclosing class:
Stock
public static record Stock.SAStockRequest(String name, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int markupRate, int quantity, int stockLimit) extends Record
This record contains the data required to make a SA request to add/update stock in CA.

  • Constructor Details

    • SAStockRequest

      public SAStockRequest(String name, String packageType, String units, int unitsInAPack, float bulkCost, int markupRate, int quantity, int stockLimit)
      Creates an instance of a SAStockRequest record class.
      Parameters:
      name - the value for the name record component
      packageType - the value for the packageType record component
      units - the value for the units record component
      unitsInAPack - the value for the unitsInAPack record component
      bulkCost - the value for the bulkCost record component
      markupRate - the value for the markupRate record component
      quantity - the value for the quantity record component
      stockLimit - the value for the stockLimit record component

  • Method Details

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
